feedback.text: It would be nice if this act could include a bit about consumers rights also. Companies being able to lock us out of purchases in videogames while we paid for them is very unfair and for now we do not own what we pay for when it comes to games including micro transaction. This happened to games like The crew and Anthem wich are now taken offline and completely unable to be played despite people paying for it. Personally i've enjoyed these games a bunch and i think it is awful that a company can decide to take it offline completely. There is already a citizens initiative that tries to push this that has over 1 million signatures. But it would be nice if this could be added to the digital fairness act also so we can finally own all digital purchases we make.
